demographic_profile.summary: Professional data analysts, product managers, and business intelligence specialists who analyze user behavior patterns across large user bases at enterprise companies. They are driven by the need to extract actionable insights from massive datasets to inform business decisions and optimize user experiences. Their primary frustrations include data quality issues, tool limitations at scale, and translating complex behavioral patterns into clear business recommendations for stakeholders.
